'''âth-v-ng''' ('''kathavang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:linearise|linearise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-v-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:linearise|linearise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-v-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kathavang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithavang|thithavang]] || [[word:jithavang|jithavang]] || [[word:shithavang|shithavang]] || [[word:kithavang|kithavang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthavang|thuthuthavang]] || [[word:jujuthavang|jujuthavang]] || [[word:shushuthavang|shushuthavang]] || [[word:kukuthavang|kukuthavang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthavang|thuthavang]] || [[word:juthavang|juthavang]] || [[word:shuthavang|shuthavang]] || [[word:kuthavang|kuthavang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthavang|thuthavang]] || [[word:juthavang|juthavang]] || [[word:shuthavang|shuthavang]] || [[word:kuthavang|kuthavang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethavang|thethavang]] || [[word:jethavang|jethavang]] || [[word:shethavang|shethavang]] || [[word:kethavang|kethavang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothavang|thothothavang]] || [[word:jojothavang|jojothavang]] || [[word:shoshothavang|shoshothavang]] || [[word:kokothavang|kokothavang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothavang|thothavang]] || [[word:jothavang|jothavang]] || [[word:shothavang|shothavang]] || [[word:kothavang|kothavang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothavang|thothavang]] || [[word:jothavang|jothavang]] || [[word:shothavang|shothavang]] || [[word:kothavang|kothavang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthavang|thĂŠthavang]] || [[word:jĂŠthavang|jĂŠthavang]] || [[word:shĂŠthavang|shĂŠthavang]] || [[word:kĂŠthavang|kĂŠthavang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathavang|thathathavang]] || [[word:jajathavang|jajathavang]] || [[word:shashathavang|shashathavang]] || [[word:kakathavang|kakathavang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathavang|thathavang]] || [[word:jathavang|jathavang]] || [[word:shathavang|shathavang]] || [[word:kathavang|kathavang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathavang|thathavang]] || [[word:jathavang|jathavang]] || [[word:shathavang|shathavang]] || [[word:kathavang|kathavang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathavang|shathavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathavang|goshathavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathavang|gokishathavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathavangnĂŒ|shathavangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathavangnknĂŒ|goshathavangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavangnĂŒ|gokishathavangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathavangshĂ«|shathavangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathavangnkshĂ«|goshathavangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathavangshĂ«|gokishathavangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavangro|shathavangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavangnkro|goshathavangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavangro|gokishathavangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavangmu|shathavangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavangnkmu|goshathavangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavangmu|gokishathavangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathavangsher|shathavangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathavangnksher|goshathavangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathavangsher|gokishathavangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathavang|shathavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathavangnkng|goshathavangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathavang|gokishathavang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathavangya|shathavangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathavangnkya|goshathavangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathavangya|gokishathavangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathavangyam|shathavangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathavangnkyam|goshathavangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathavangyam|gokishathavangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavangnĂŒshĂ«|shathavangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathavangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathavangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavangnĂŒro|shathavangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavangnknĂŒro|goshathavangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavangnĂŒro|gokishathavangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavangnĂŒmu|shathavangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavangnknĂŒmu|goshathavangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavangnĂŒmu|gokishathavangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavangshĂ«nĂŒ|shathavangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathavangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathavangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavangshĂ«ro|shathavangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavangnkshĂ«ro|goshathavangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavangshĂ«ro|gokishathavangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavangshĂ«mu|shathavangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavangnkshĂ«mu|goshathavangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavangshĂ«mu|gokishathavangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavangronĂŒ|shathavangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavangnkronĂŒ|goshathavangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavangronĂŒ|gokishathavangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavangroshĂ«|shathavangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavangnkroshĂ«|goshathavangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavangroshĂ«|gokishathavangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathavangromu|shathavangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathavangnkromu|goshathavangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathavangromu|gokishathavangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathavangmunĂŒ|shathavangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathavangnkmunĂŒ|goshathavangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathavangmunĂŒ|gokishathavangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathavangmushĂ«|shathavangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathavangnkmushĂ«|goshathavangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathavangmushĂ«|gokishathavangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathavangmuro|shathavangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathavangnkmuro|goshathavangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathavangmuro|gokishathavangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
